transcript.text:
Hello everyone
We're getting ready to close the restaurant for the day
Everyone is working hard to separate the rice cake
As you can see here
Excuse me Yes?
What are you doing?
Separating the rice cakes
Why?
Do you need something?
You guys are very popular
Who said that?
[From the conference video]
Thank you
Manager Yes?
[Awkward]
What are you doing?

Washing the rag
What are you doing?
Cleaning
What are you doing?
I'm doing the dishes
Let's keep it up!
[Mind your own business]
She's good
Stop it
Park Jung Won!
She's so fast
She's a machine
[Closing procedures continue]
[Late Night Snack] I'm ordering Chinese cuisine
I'm getting jjajangmyun, what do you guys want?
Me me me

Same
[We'll just look at the menu] Japchae rice looks good, look at that shrimp
I want cream shrimp and sweet & sour pork
Spicy Fried Shrimp, and
Mapo Tofu looks good Stop it
[Escape]
[The food is here]
Thank you
[Excited]
This isn't all for me
I'll share it with my workers
Bon appetit
Delicious
[Silent Mukbang]
I'm so hungry at this time of the day
I just end up eating without saying anything

I'm eating while watching her mukbang
So cool
[Getting bored]
Hey guys
I heard you wanted to become a YouTuber
Come do mukbang with me
We're really going to
You had kimchi!?
It's a bit embarrassing Right
Same
Say hello to the subscribers first
Hello..
How do you do it?
Just say hi
Hello, we are Garden Bunsik part-time workers
[Not satisfied]

Why!?
Say that was good
A lot of people are saying they're pretty
They used to be kpop idols
Once upon a time
She's good!
Part-time worker Nam Min Jung (25)
Our dark past Hi, I'm Choi Ji Sun (25)
Now they want to be YouTubers
Right?
What?
I don't know what I'm saying
Having them here is weird
Should we eat?
Let the subscribers know first
Bon appetit

I really like their shrimp
I haven't tried the soup yet
[Spicy shrimp is so good]
But..
Do you think we'll do well?
What do you think? Be real with us
What are your contents?
We don't have anything yet
But what do you think
How do you feel about it?
You will do well
Why do you think so?
No, really
She avoided eye contact
What's the hardest part of your job?
Trying to eat without anyone noticing

I'm not even kidding
We look around and she's at the counter eating by herself
Just like this
The Spicy Rice Cake is good though
That's true
What's your favorite food?
Our Spicy Rice Cake!
Really
I've never liked spicy rice cake this much
This is not scripted
Let's get a drink
Bring it
Yay
[Tzu-fuel]
I'm going to try that too
Oh no

That's a good sign
It exploded
[Optimistic]
I have to clean that later
It's my first time seeing a mukbang this close
I don't know what to say right now Give me a second
You really do eat everything
Me? Of course
I just said it for fun
[Already used to it]
You've seen me eat many times before
You said that you weren't good at eating jjajangmyun
And I believed that
You're just on another level
[6 bowls because she's not good at eating jjajangmyun]
Let me try that

She folds the noodles
I'm off to a bad start (short noodles)
Let's just eat
You're eating a lot today
Off to a bad start again
Do you have a big mouth? Yes
I can fit my fist
Me too
Really? Want to see?
Don't do it
No really
Yeah really. Don't
Me too then
[Everyone can do it]
Just take bites
Did you come up with the name of your YouTube channel?

No
'Tzuyang' is a good name
So you should make 1 for us
Min Jung & Ji Sun
MinJi
Stop
I came up with mine like that
Why are you Tzuyang?
[Because of her name Jung Won]
Then we're Min Jung Ji Jiang...?]
Mi Ji Sum
How's Mi Ji Soo
Not bad
That's our future
Unknown
Can we become as popular as you?

That is Unknown
What did you film so far?
A lot
Mukbang,
Tricks too
What kind of food?
Chicken, pizza
Jjajangmyun too
How many do you have?
We're prepared
We did so much
Which one's the funniest?
[Decide for yourself]
That's yours?
Don't show too much Just kidding
That's just a concept

Is this real?
We really did it
I don't believe it
No way
Why won't you believe us?
Show her the next one
This is the real us
That's edited
No way!
Do you like it when people say your mukbangs are edited!?
That was over the line
Yeah, I agree
Let's go
I'm finished eating
Thanks for the tips today
It helped

Nothing has been established
No really, it was a help
Thank you for the food
Enjoy
We'll be cleaning up
But really
We're never awkward with each other
But so awkward in front of the camera
[Finished]
I ate some jjajangmyun with the workers after business hours
We have to clean up and get going
So I'll end the video here
Thanks everyone~
[Checking the earnings]
Not bad
Really?
[Not ordering shrimp next time..] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
